title: (e.g., mask: Face ), Or Is This Exclusively
sourceTitle: Is There Syntax Trigger Specific Inpainting Masks
prompt:
Is there a syntax to trigger specific Inpainting masks directly from the text prompt (e.g., mask: "face"), or is this exclusively a GUI feature on the web alpha? 11. Personalization Blending: What is the limit and syntax for blending multiple Personalization Codes? (e.g., --p codeA codeB vs --p codeA::0.5 codeB::0.5)?

SECTION E: MODEL VERSIONS & DEPRECATION12. Niji v7 Integration: Is the Niji (Anime) model now a style switch (--style niji) within v7, or remains a standalone model (--iji 7)? 13. Legacy Flags: Have --upbeta, --testp, or --video (the old react-to-envelope version) been fully removed or repurposed?
originalPrompt:
Is there a syntax to trigger specific Inpainting masks directly from the text prompt (e.g., mask: "face"), or is this exclusively a GUI feature on the web alpha? 11. Personalization Blending: What is the limit and syntax for blending multiple Personalization Codes? (e.g., --p codeA codeB vs --p codeA::0.5 codeB::0.5)?

SECTION E: MODEL VERSIONS & DEPRECATION12. Niji v7 Integration: Is the Niji (Anime) model now a style switch (--style niji) within v7, or remains a standalone model (--iji 7)? 13. Legacy Flags: Have --upbeta, --testp, or --video (the old react-to-envelope version) been fully removed or repurposed?
